---
# title: "Kenneth Breugelmans"
# subtitle: "Data Scientist | Builder at Heart | Applying ML, Engineering & Operational Experience to Transform Terminal Operations"
listing:
  contents: research
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, reading-time, description]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
toc: false
number-sections: false
---

# Kenneth Breugelmans {.hero-title}
### Data Scientist | Builder at Heart | Applying ML, Engineering & Operational Experience to Transform Terminal Operations {.hero-subtitle}

&nbsp;

&nbsp;

## About the Lab

This portfolio showcases interactive whitepapers and technical research. Unlike static PDFs, these reports allow for real-time data exploration and interactive visualization to better communicate complex findings.

---

## Featured Research
